description:
The IT Service Desk is launching a self-service hardware portal tomorrow. The IT Manager needs standard peripherals to be requestable by anyone, but noticed a high-end Executive MacBook model was accidentally made requestable. Additionally, a specific batch of three ThinkPad laptops needs to be moved to the Helpdesk location and marked as requestable loaners, while leaving identical executive ThinkPads untouched.

Configure the self-service portal by making the 'Dell U2723QE Monitor' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S' models requestable, while ensuring the 'Apple MacBook Pro 16 M3 Max' model is not requestable. For the specific assets with tags 'LOANER-T14-01', 'LOANER-T14-02', and 'LOANER-T14-03', set them as requestable and change their default location to 'IT Helpdesk - Walk-up'. Ensure that assets 'EXEC-T14-01' and 'EXEC-T14-02' remain not requestable and their locations are unchanged.
